meta.title: USMC Silent Drill Platoon
meta.description: The United States Marine Corps Silent Drill Platoon is a twenty-four man rifle platoon often referred to as “The Marching 24.” This highly-skilled platoon performs unique silent precision exhibition drills to demonstrate  the discipline and professionalism of the Marine Corps.
